title: Market Data Archive v1
description: Build the first durable market data archive layer: universes, bars, provider abstraction, streak/repeated-list analytics, and reports. Scope v1 uses Yahoo/Stooq adapter with hooks for paid providers.
acceptance_criteria: Provider interfaces exist; market archive schema is migrated idempotently; universe/bar scripts can sync data; price-streak and repeated-top-list reports use clear ticker language and d1-d10 paths; tests and docs are added.
close_reason: Market Data Archive v1 scaffold and research report slice implemented and verified.

title: Market data provider abstraction
description: Create provider interfaces and Yahoo/Stooq adapter plus non-failing scaffolds for Polygon, Alpaca, FMP, TwelveData.
close_reason: Implemented Market Data Archive v1 scaffold: providers, schema, sync scripts, tests, docs.

title: Market archive schema migrations
description: Add idempotent migrations for market_universe, market_bars, market_data_runs, market_streak_signals.
close_reason: Implemented Market Data Archive v1 scaffold: providers, schema, sync scripts, tests, docs.

title: Universe and bar sync scripts
description: Add scripts to sync SP500/NASDAQ/MOVERS universe and fetch daily/hourly bars into market_bars.
close_reason: Implemented Market Data Archive v1 scaffold: providers, schema, sync scripts, tests, docs.

title: Research reports for price streak and repeated top list
description: Replace ad-hoc report logic with clear ticker/candidate wording, sequence dates, d1-d10 paths, reversal/continuation, and HTML output.
close_reason: Report scripts now use shared helpers, candidate/ticker/vector wording, sequence dates, and verified price-streak semantics.

comments.author: Filipp Miller
comments.text: Left open intentionally. The archive/research helper layer is in place; next step is to refactor the generated HTML reports to consume these helpers and produce ticker/candidate wording, sequence dates, and d1-d10 path tables.

title: Tests and documentation for Market Data Archive v1
description: Add focused tests for streak/repeated-list helpers/provider normalization and document how to run/verify the archive layer.
close_reason: Implemented Market Data Archive v1 scaffold: providers, schema, sync scripts, tests, docs.
